# MOE Kompozit - B2B Composite Manufacturing Solutions
> Karbon fiber, CTP (Cam Elyaf Takviyeli Plastik) ve hibrit kompozit teknolojilerinde endüstriyel üretim merkezi.

## Core Capabilities
- **Engineering Excellence**: Specialized in high-performance composite sub-components for Defense, Energy, and Transportation.
- **Mass Production**: Capacity for municipal landscaping equipment (Planters) and institutional burial products (Coffins).
- **Industrial Standards**: Manufacturing according to technical specifications, tolerance analysis, and material certification (AS9100 baseline).

## Key Sectors
- **Landscaping**: Large-scale planters, urban furniture with UV and corrosion resistance.
- **Storage**: Modular FRP tanks, chemical storage enclosures, and waterproofing solutions.
- **Defense**: Carbon fiber structural parts, lightweight enclosures for electronic warfare and naval platforms.
- **Energy**: Wind turbine component maintenance, transformer enclosures, and composite insulators.

## Contact & B2B
- **Headquarters**: Istanbul, Turkiye.
- **Technical Inquiries**: offers@moekompozit.com
- **Website**: https://moekompozit.com

## Documentation Hierarchy
- /products: Industrial grade product catalog.
- /solutions: Sector-specific engineering application guides.
- /about: Manufacturing fleet, quality standards, and corporate history.
- /contact: Technical response lines and 24h inquiry portal.
